Raid Battles.title: Shadow Heatran in Shadow Raids
Raid Battles.description:
Shadow Heatran will appear in Pokémon GO in Shadow Raids. If you’re lucky you’ll be able to encounter Shiny Shadow Heatran!
Shadow Heatran will appear in five-star Shadow Raids every weekend from December 2 to January 1:
- December 6 - December 7
- December 13 - December 14
- December 20 - December 21
- December 27 - December 28

Raid Battles.title: Blacephalon in Raids
Raid Battles.description: Blacephalon return to raids on December 31, 2025, at 10 am local time.

Raid Battles.title: Mega Swampert in Mega Raids
Raid Battles.description: Mega Swampert return to Mega Raids on December 31, 2025, at 10 am local time.

Community Day.title: Piplup Community Day Classic

bonuses: 1-hour Lures**
1/4 Hatch Distance
3-hour Incense*
Increased Spawns

Community Day.description: Piplup, the Penguin Pokémon, will be featured during January Community Day Classic!

Event.title: New Year's 2026

bonuses: 2× Stardust from Raid Battles
2× XP from Raid Battles
Increased chance to encounter Shiny Party Top Hat Pikachu
One additional Raid Pass per day from spinning Photo Discs at Gyms (for a daily total of two)

Event.description: Ring in 2026 with Pokémon GO’s New Year’s event!

Event.title: Pinch Perfect

bonuses: 2× XP for catching Pokémon
Increased chance of encountering Shiny Corphish, Shiny Dwebble, and Shiny Clauncher

Event.description: Beware and prepare for Klawf and more during the Pinch Perfect event!

PokéStop Showcase.title: Pikachu PokéStop Showcase
PokéStop Showcase.description:
There will be PokéStop Showcases featuring Pikachu. Top the leaderboard to win rewards including Premium Items!
- Pikachu

PokéStop Showcase.title: Water-type and Grass-type PokéStop Showcases
PokéStop Showcase.description: There will be PokéStop Showcases featuring Water-type Pokémon and Grass-type Pokémon. Top the leaderboard to win rewards including Premium Items!

PokéStop Showcase.title: Klawf and Dhelmise PokéStop Showcases
PokéStop Showcase.description:
There will be PokéStop Showcases featuring Klawf and Dhelmise. Top the leaderboard to win rewards including Premium Items!
- Dhelmise
- Klawf

Max Mondays.title: Dynamax Drampa during Max Monday
Max Mondays.description:
These Dynamax Pokémon may appear in Max Battles throughout Tales of Transformation. They will also take over Power Spots for an hour each week on Mondays from 6:00 p.m. to 7:00 p.m. local time!
On January 5, 2026, the featured Dynamax Pokémon is Drampa.
- Drampa

Max Mondays.title: Dynamax Caterpie during Max Monday
Max Mondays.description:
These Dynamax Pokémon may appear in Max Battles throughout Tales of Transformation. They will also take over Power Spots for an hour each week on Mondays from 6:00 p.m. to 7:00 p.m. local time!
On January 12, 2026, the featured Dynamax Pokémon is Caterpie.
- Caterpie

GO Pass.title: GO Pass: December

bonuses: 2× Daily Adventure Incense duration
Additional rewards for completing in-person raids and Max Battles
Hold up to 10 additional Gifts in your Item Bag
Hold up to 20 additional Gifts in your Item Bag
Open up to 40 Gifts per day
Open up to 50 Gifts per day
Receive up to 125 Gifts per day from spinning PokéStop and Gym Photo Discs
Receive up to 150 Gifts per day from spinning PokéStop and Gym Photo Discs

GO Pass.description:
Palkia and the Timed Incubator return for GO Pass: December!
From Tuesday, December 2, 2025, at 10:00 a.m. to Tuesday, January 6, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. local time, the GO Pass and GO Pass Deluxe for December will be available in Pokémon GO!

GO Battle League.title: Great League, Ultra League, and Master League | Precious Paths
GO Battle League.description:
The Great League, Ultra League, and Master League will run from December 30, 2025, at 1:00 p.m. to January 6, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. PT.
Trainers will also receive 4× Stardust from win rewards (this does not include end-of-set rewards).
- Pokémon must be at or below 1,500 CP to enter.
- Pokémon must be at or below 2,500 CP to enter.
- All Pokémon are eligible.

Pokémon Spotlight Hour.title: Barboach Spotlight Hour
Pokémon Spotlight Hour.description:
Pokémon Spotlight Hour will feature a different Pokémon and special bonus for one hour at 6:00 p.m. local time on Tuesday during the month of January.
January 6: The featured Pokémon is Barboach and the special bonus is 2× Catch XP.

Raid Hour.title: Genesect (Burn Drive), Genesect (Chill Drive) Raid Hour
Raid Hour.description: A Raid Hour featuring Genesect (Burn Drive), Genesect (Chill Drive) is scheduled from 6 to 7 pm Local Time. During this hour there will be an increased number of 5-star Raids.

Raid Day.title: Kyurem Fusion Raid Day

bonuses: 2× Stardust from Raid Battles
50% more XP from Raid Battles
Eight additional Raid Passes from spinning Gym Photo Discs (for a daily total of 14)
Increased chance to encounter Shiny Reshiram, Shiny Zekrom, and Shiny Kyurem in raids
Increased chance to get Rare Candy XL from Raid Battles
Receive up to five additional free Raid Passes from spinning Gym Photo Discs (for a total of six)

Reshiram, Zekrom, Black Kyurem* and White Kyurem* will appear more frequently in raids, and these Raid Bosses will alternate each half hour during event hours. Reshiram and Black Kyurem will appear in raids first, followed by Zekrom and White Kyurem
The Remote Raid Pass limit will increase to 20 from Friday, January 9, at 5:00 p.m. to Saturday, January 10, 2026, at 8:00 p.m. PST

Raid Day.description: Battle with the twin heroes for truth or ideals during Kyurem Fusion Raid Day!
